recommendations.title: Vengeance Is Mine
recommendations.overview: A thief, a murderer, and a charming lady-killer, Iwao Enokizu is on the run from the police.

recommendations.title: The Eel
recommendations.overview: A businessman kills his adulterous wife and is sent to prison. After his release, he opens a barbershop and meets new people, talking  to almost no one except for an eel he befriended while in prison.

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Narayama
recommendations.overview: In a small village in a valley everyone who reaches the age of 70 must leave the village and go to a certain mountain top to die. If anyone should refuse they would disgrace their family. Old Orin is 69. This winter it is her turn to go to the mounta

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: Oppenheimer
recommendations.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: To End All War: Oppenheimer & the Atomic Bomb
recommendations.overview: Explore how one man's relentless drive and invention of the atomic bomb changed the nature of war forever, led to the deaths of hundreds of thousands of people and unleashed mass hysteria.

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.
